name: Meeting ID Convention

artifacts.description: Comprehensive meeting ID convention documentation with format rules, transformation examples, and edge case handling

summary: Successfully documented the canonical meeting ID convention format (YYYY-MM-DD_Descriptive-Name) with comprehensive transformation rules, character mapping, and edge case handling. Includes 15+ examples covering various scenarios from basic meetings to complex names with special characters. Document provides implementation guidelines and validation rules for consistent ID generation across the meeting ingestion system.

acceptance_criteria.edge_cases_covered: ✓ Multiple edge cases documented with solutions

notes: Document includes character mapping table, length constraints, fallback strategies, and implementation guidelines. All examples demonstrate the transformation from various input formats to the canonical kebab-case format.
